title: The Ooze that Whispers
summary: Farmer Tallen fears the slimes are watching him.
description: Farmer Tallen is terrified. The slimes aren't just eating crops; they are *watching* him. He swears one formed a face that looked like his late wife. He needs you to kill them and bring back samples to the Alchemist, but he's too scared to touch them.

flavor_text.defeat:Verdant Slime: The slime dissolves with a sound like a sigh. Was that... relief?
flavor_text.collect:slime_gel: The gel is warm and vibrates faintly in your flask.
flavor_text.examine:pulsing_puddle: You find a puddle of slime that isn't evaporating. It ripples in a pattern... almost like a heartbeat.

title: Gathering Healing Herbs
summary: The local healer needs fresh medicinal plants.
description: The Whispering Thicket grows herbs found nowhere else, especially Moonleaf—gleaming silver leaves used to treat fevers. With monsters stirring, Mirra can’t safely gather them herself. She requests an adventurer to harvest the plants before night-dew poisons their potency.

title: Lost Child of the Creek
summary: A villager’s child wandered into the forest.
description: A young girl, Lina, chased her pet sprite into the treeline and never returned. The local guard is stretched thin and needs someone swift to search the nearby clearings. Time is short—nightfall brings predators hungrier than wolves.

title: A Pest Problem
summary: Giant forest rats are tearing into supply crates.
description: Doran’s shipments have been gnawed open by oversized rodents infused with Veil-sickness. Their boldness grows daily, and his livelihood is at risk. Clear them out before he loses another week’s worth of grain and cloth.

title: Timber Run
summary: Deliver chopped timber to Willowcreek.
description: Travelers fear the woodland paths at dusk, forcing Elwin’s workers to abandon their supply of freshly cut lumber. The carpenter needs someone resilient enough to haul the materials before thieves or creatures steal them away.

title: Clear the Campsite
summary: Clear goblins from a campsite Rima wants to use.
description: Rima, an overly enthusiastic explorer, set up camp deep in goblin-infested brush. Before she can proceed with her “grand expedition,” she needs the area cleared of lurking scavenger goblins.

title: Strange Tracks
summary: Investigate unusual beast tracks near town.
description: Claw marks and hoofprints twisted by corruption have appeared near the northern trail. Yorin suspects a malformed creature but needs confirmation from someone willing to venture deeper.

title: Lantern Delivery
summary: Deliver lanterns to patrolling guards.
description: With fog thickening earlier each day, sentries require new lanterns to maintain visibility. Highwaymen have grown bold at dusk, so the guards depend on timely supply delivery.

title: A Meal for the Road
summary: Gather ingredients for travel rations.
description: Vero’s inn prepares provisions for those venturing into the forest. He needs fresh mushroom caps and forest berries, both of which grow near shallow cave mouths—often watched by lurking slimes.

title: The Broken Snare
summary: Retrieve parts from damaged animal traps.
description: Dane’s metal snares were shattered, bent by something far stronger than wolves. He wishes to salvage what remains before it rusts or is stolen by goblins.

title: Goblin Skirmishers
summary: Goblins are organizing raids.
description: For the first time in seasons, goblins have formed war skirmishes. Their scouts have been spotted mapping forest paths—an alarming sign of future raids. Rhea needs swift action before these pests grow bold enough to strike Willowcreek.

title: Venom in the Roots
summary: Collect venom samples from poisonous snakes.
description: Strange serpents have slithered into the grove, their fangs dripping an iridescent toxin unseen since before the Sundering. Lune hopes to refine an antidote—but only if someone brings her samples.

title: Echoes in the Hollow
summary: Investigate eerie whispers from a rotten tree cavern.
description: Travelers claim that the Hollowtree whispers names, luring wanderers closer. Sorin suspects a Veil-born sprite nesting inside. He needs someone who won’t be fooled by its illusions.

title: The Lumberjack’s Wrath
summary: Eliminate a territorial Treeling.
description: A sentient sap-creature—the Treeling—has claimed Birchfall Path, harassing workers and smashing tools. Bran asks for aid before the creature’s roots choke out the entire path.

title: Shadows Over the Water
summary: Water spirits are disturbing fishermen.
description: Moonwater’s surface shimmers even without sun, revealing restless Naiads that drag nets underwater. Amon fears someone will be taken next. He needs protection.

title: Broken Idol Pieces
summary: Recover fragments of an ancient forest idol.
description: Goblins shattered a woodland idol to steal its gemstones. Firren wishes to reassemble the relic before its latent magic spills into the wild.

title: A Test of Aim
summary: Practice combat against agile forest beasts.
description: Alyss trains new recruits by sending them after Swift-tail Hares—nimble creatures infused with faint forest magic. Catching them tests reflex and precision.

title: The Missing Courier
summary: Find a courier who vanished en route to Willowcreek.
description: A forest courier carrying urgent correspondence never arrived. Tracks suggest he was chased off-road by beasts. His satchel holds valuable village contracts.

title: Spider Nest Purge
summary: Destroy a growing spider nest.
description: The Webwood’s population of brood spiders has ballooned, stringing webs across traveler roads. Their venom weakens limbs, making escape impossible. Rhea requires an adventurer to thin their numbers.

title: Mushroom Menace
summary: Defeat aggressive fungus creatures.
description: Sporeshrooms have sprouted beyond their usual cycle, animated by warped forest mana. Pim’s harvesting routes are blocked unless these lumbering fungi are cleared.

title: The Goblin Lieutenant
summary: Take down a goblin commander.
description: A cunning goblin lieutenant has unified several scattered tribes. His camp rings with stolen steel and crude banners. If left unchecked, an organized horde might rise.

title: Forest Spirit in Pain
summary: Aid a wounded forest spirit.
description: A Heartwood Sprite has been corrupted by a splinter of Veil energy lodged in its body. Leira believes an adventurer with a steady hand can help remove it—if they can survive its thrashing.

title: Hunt the Moonfang Wolf
summary: Hunt a powerful forest wolf touched by moonlight.
description: The Moonfang Wolf is a silver-coated predator that leads lesser wolves with eerie discipline. Yorin fears it will turn its pack upon the village unless someone challenges it.

title: Entangled Roots
summary: Destroy corrupted root-beasts.
description: Tanglesap Creatures—animated roots—have begun striking at loggers. Their claws are formed of hardened bark and their bodies pulse with sickly green glow.

title: Signs of the First Boss (Thornhide Bear)
summary: Scout territory of the Thornhide Bear.
description: Massive claw marks and uprooted trees mark the hunting grounds of Thornhide—the first of the forest’s three boss creatures. Before a slaying party mobilizes, Rhea needs precise scouting intel.

title: A Merchant in Tears
summary: Recover stolen trade goods.
description: Bandit-goblins ambushed Salvi and fled into the thicket with his fabrics and spices. The merchant begs someone to reclaim the goods before the creatures burn or eat them.

title: Cleanse the Shrine
summary: Purify a shrine corrupted by Veil energy.
description: The Moonshadow Shrine’s white stones have turned black-veined, its pool reflecting horrors instead of moonlight. Mara needs an adventurer to drive off the wraithlings haunting it.

title: The Spider Matron
summary: Hunt the matriarch of the spider colony.
description: The brood spiders answer to a single massive mother whose venom sacs can rot bark. Her growing brood threatens to spread beyond Webwood entirely.

title: Before the Storm
summary: Prepare the town for coming threats.
description: The council fears an impending surge of monsters, driven outward by the forest bosses awakening. They require supplies gathered and warnings spread to outlying homes.

title: The Whispering Oak
summary: Investigate a sacred tree murmuring with corrupted voices.
description: The Whispering Oak, ancient guardian of the forest, has begun muttering in tones unlike any druidic language. Leira suspects an unseen parasite clinging to its bark—one born of the Veil.

title: Storm Warning
summary: Suppress the rising number of Stormlings.
description: Stormlings are crackling with unusual intensity, threatening to spark wildfires despite the damp. Jace needs them thinned out before the static charge becomes a lightning storm.

title: Mire Dredging
summary: Gather Iron Ore from the Fen.
description: Gorn claims the iron found in the fen is tempered by the constant magical storms. He needs a fresh supply to forge weapons capable of piercing elite hides.

title: Shadows in the Mist
summary: Hunt the elusive Dusklings.
description: Dusklings use the fog to ambush patrols. Valen needs an adventurer to turn the tables and hunt the hunters.

title: The Lost Patrol
summary: Locate the missing patrol unit.
description: A squad sent to map the fen has gone silent. Rhea fears they've been led astray by wisps. Find them before the bog claims them forever.

title: Essence of Decay
summary: Defeat Mire Lurkers for their essence.
description: The slime of a Mire Lurker is potent but volatile. Miral needs samples fresh from the source to stabilize her latest brew.

title: Revenant's Curse
summary: Put Fen Revenants to rest.
description: The restless dead in the fen are rising as Revenants. Elara asks you to grant them peace with steel and spell.

title: Ancient Wood Harvest
summary: Gather Ancient Wood.
description: The petrified wood of the fen is harder than stone. Elwin needs it for reinforcing the town gates.

title: The Glade Empress
summary: Slay the Glade Empress.
description: The corrupted heart of the fen has manifested as the Glade Empress. Her rule spreads rot. End her reign.

title: Survey the Ruins
summary: Survey the sunken ruins.
description: Old ruins have surfaced in the mire. Arin needs a sketch of the inscriptions before they sink again.

title: Wisp Hunt
summary: Disperse Wisp-Sentinels.
description: The Wisp-Sentinels are coordinating the fen's defenses. Blind the enemy by removing their eyes.

title: Glimmering Harvest
summary: Collect crystals for lens crafting.
description: Jolen requires high-quality Luminescent Crystals to craft lenses for the city's defenses. The ones found near the surface are too clouded, so you must venture deeper.

title: Shattered Reflections
summary: Clear out Prism Spiders blinding scouts.
description: Prism Spiders are using the cavern's reflective surfaces to ambush scouts. Their numbers have grown too large for the advance team to handle safely.

title: Construct of Old
summary: Defeat Crystal Golems guarding ancient texts.
description: Ancient texts lie within the deeper ruins of the cavern, but they are guarded by Crystal Golems—automata that have not forgotten their orders after centuries.

title: Shadows in the Light
summary: Obsidian Gargoyles are swooping on miners.
description: Miners extracting mithril are being targeted by Obsidian Gargoyles. These beasts dive silently from the ceiling, making them a lethal threat to the operation.

title: Heart of the Cavern
summary: The Crystalline Guardian has awakened.
description: Tremors from the Crystal Caverns suggest the Crystalline Guardian has stirred. If it is not subdued, the entire cavern system could collapse.

title: Obsidian Mining
summary: Retrieve obsidian shards for masterwork weapons.
description: Gorn needs Obsidian Shards tempered by the caldera's heat to forge weapons capable of piercing dragon scales. Only the bravest can gather them.

title: Living Flame
summary: Study Fire Elementals.
description: Lyra believes the Fire Elementals of the caldera hold the secret to a lost spell. She needs field data—obtained by engaging them in combat.

title: Magma Rising
summary: Magma Golems are blocking the path.
description: A lava flow has shifted, and Magma Golems have blocked the main descent path. They must be cleared for the expedition to continue.

title: Drake Hunt
summary: A Lava Drake has been spotting near the rim.
description: A Lava Drake has claimed a perch dangerously close to the survey camp. Yorin needs a skilled hunter to bring the beast down before it roasts the tents.

title: Lord of Cinders
summary: Ignis threatens to erupt the caldera.
description: Ignis, Lord of Cinders, is gathering power at the caldera's heart. If his ritual completes, a volcanic eruption will consume everything. Stop him.

title: Wolf Pack Thinning
summary: Frost Wolves are encroaching on trade routes.
description: The Frost Wolves have grown too numerous and are hunting near the main road. Yorin needs their numbers thinned to ensure safe passage for supply caravans.

title: Core Collection
summary: Collect Ice Cores for research.
description: Jolen believes Ice Cores can be used to create powerful cooling enchantments. He needs fresh samples from the constructs of the expanse.

title: Frozen Constructs
summary: Ice Golems block the pass.
description: A group of Ice Golems has blocked the only pass through the Glacial Valley. Rhea needs a heavy hitter to smash through their ranks.

title: Drake Danger
summary: Glacial Drakes are terrorizing the skies.
description: Glacial Drakes are diving from the peaks, freezing scouts before they can report back. Valen needs someone to ground these beasts.

title: The Frozen King
summary: Cryon threatens to freeze the world.
description: Cryon, the Frozen King, stirs from his slumber. If he is not stopped, he will bring an eternal winter to Eldoria. End his reign.

title: Tide of Stone
summary: Coral Golems are blocking underwater passages.
description: The Sunken Grotto's natural pathways are being sealed off by migrating Coral Golems. Liora needs them cleared to access the deeper reefs where rare specimens thrive.

title: Lurkers in the Deep
summary: Abyssal Eels are attacking research probes.
description: Liora's magical probes, sent to monitor water quality, are being snapped up by Abyssal Eels. Thin their numbers so the research can continue.

title: Siren's Call
summary: Tide Sirens are luring sailors to their doom.
description: Old shanties speak of the Tide Sirens' song. Arin has found evidence that these songs are actually a form of corrupted magic that needs to be silenced.

title: Crushing Depths
summary: Deep Crawler shells are needed for armor plating.
description: The pressure in the Grotto makes Deep Crawler shells incredibly dense. Gorn wants to test if they can be forged into superior plate armor.

title: The Leviathan's Wake
summary: The Leviathan has surfaced.
description: The apex predator of the Grotto, the Leviathan, has grown too bold. Its thrashing causes tidal waves that threaten the coast. It must be put down.

title: The Silent Witness: Evidence
summary: Investigate a potential traitor within the Guild.
description: A page has been torn from a forbidden tome in the Guild Library. Archivist Thorne suspects a traitor has stolen it to perform a dark ritual. Search the grounds for clues before the trail goes cold.

flavor_text.examine:Torn Journal Page: You find a crumpled parchment caught in the brambles. It's covered in frantic scribbles about 'The Weaver's Return'.
flavor_text.examine:Discarded Dagger: A dagger with a twisted, serpentine hilt lies half-buried in the mud. The blade hums with a faint, nauseating energy.
flavor_text.locate:Hooded Figure: You spot a figure in grey robes slipping into the shadows. They leave behind a pouch of strange, glowing dust.

title: The Silent Witness: Justice
summary: Hunt down the Veil-bound traitor.
description: The clues point to the Whispering Thicket. The traitor, a member of the 'Veil-bound' cult, is attempting to complete the ritual. Thorne has authorized their elimination.

flavor_text.defeat:Veil-bound Assassin: As the assassin falls, their body dissolves into black mist, leaving only the stolen page behind.

title: The Hissing Corridors
summary: Scout the steam-filled corridors.
description: Jolen's instruments have picked up strange fluctuations from the ancient Clockwork Halls. The entrance is choked with steam and guarded by wisps of pure energy. Clear the way so he can set up his equipment.

flavor_text.defeat:Steam Wisp: The wisp dissipates with a sharp hiss, leaving the air smelling of ozone and copper.

title: Gears of War
summary: Collect parts for repairs.
description: The machinery inside is marvelous but degraded. Jolen needs specific components—pristine brass gears and tensioned spring coils—to repair a lift that leads deeper into the complex. The local constructs should have plenty.

flavor_text.collect:Brass Gear: This gear is surprisingly heavy and etched with runes you don't recognize.
flavor_text.collect:Spring Coil: You pry the coil loose. It snaps back with dangerous force.

title: The Knight's Vigil
summary: Defeat the Automaton Knights guarding the inner sanctum.
description: Captain Rhea is concerned about the activation of the Automaton Knights. These ancient guardians were built for war, not patrol. Their awakening suggests something—or someone—has triggered the facility's defense protocols.

flavor_text.defeat:Automaton Knight: The knight freezes mid-swing, its eyes dimming as the mana core shatters.

title: Silence the Warden
summary: Defeat The Gear Warden.
description: The source of the disturbance has been identified: The Gear Warden, the central intelligence of the Halls, has gone rogue. Its ceaseless production of war machines threatens to spill out into the caverns. Shut it down permanently.

flavor_text.defeat:The Gear Warden: With a final, deafening grind of metal on metal, the massive construct collapses. The factory falls silent.

title: The Clockwork Heart: Anomaly
summary: Investigate a malfunctioning Brass Golem.
description: Artificer Jolen beckons you over, his face illuminated by the blue glow of a holo-map. 'Adventurer, I have a puzzle. My sensors picked up a Brass Golem, Unit 734, in Sector 4. It's not patrolling. It's... loitering. And its core signature is fluctuating rhythmically. Like a heartbeat. I need eyes on it. If it's malfunctioning, it could endanger the whole sector. Go find it, but clear out the scavengers targeting it first.'

flavor_text.locate:Unit 734: You find the golem standing motionless in a quiet alcove, cradling a small, oil-stained flower.
flavor_text.defeat:Scavenger Spider: The spider hisses and crumples, its sensors dimming.
flavor_text.scan:Unit 734: The scanner hums. The golem tilts its head, watching you with strange, flickering curiosity.

title: The Clockwork Heart: Dismantle
summary: Dismantle the unstable golem. (Option A)
description: Jolen reviews the data with a frown. 'This is bad. The corruption rewrote its code to prioritize preservation, but its core is unstable. It's a walking bomb. Look, I know it seems harmless, but we can't risk a detonation in the main support strata. The safe play is to **dismantle it**. We can use the parts to reinforce the lift. It's tough, but it's necessary.'

flavor_text.defeat:Unit 734: The golem raises its arms to shield the flower, not itself. As it falls, the light in its eyes fades, resigned.
flavor_text.retrieve:Pristine Gear Heart: The core is warm and pulses faintly before going cold.

title: The Clockwork Heart: Stabilize
summary: Stabilize the golem's core. (Option B)
description: Jolen reviews the data. 'Incredible. It's developed empathy. But it's unstable. I can write a patch to regulate the power draw, but you'll have to upload it while it's active. It's dangerous—the signal will attract every security bot in the sector. You'd be risking your life for a glitch. But... if it works, we save a unique life form. If you want to **save it**, take this patch.'

flavor_text.defeat:Security Drone: Another drone crashes down. Unit 734 shudders as the patch rewrites its core.
flavor_text.upload:Stabilization Patch: Upload complete. Unit 734 stabilizes, offering you a single gear in thanks before returning to its flower.
